description: Select a nullable enum column, verifying it maps to Option<UserStatus>

rust-sqlx.enum_def:
#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, sqlx::Type)]
#[sqlx(type_name = "user_status", rename_all = "snake_case")]
pub enum UserStatus {
    Active,
    Inactive,
    Banned,
}

expected.sqlc_comparison: sqlc struggles with nullable enums in some codegen targets

name: nullable_enum
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, status user_status);
